name: the conformance auditor flags an ungrounded cloud convention rule
command:
mkdir -p standards/cloud-conventions
printf %s '- id: bad
  source_id: not-in-any-catalog
  kind: patterning
  mode: require
  token: "x"
  message: "m"
' > standards/cloud-conventions/bad.yaml
bash $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-citation-conformance.sh --root .
